CandidateCreateRequest.description:
Input payload for candidate profile creation.

Attributes:
    owner_subject_id: Optional explicit owner subject id (used by HR).
    first_name: Candidate first name.
    last_name: Candidate last name.
    email: Candidate e-mail.
    phone: Optional phone number.
    location: Optional location/city.
    current_title: Optional current title.
    extra_data: Extensible profile fields.
CandidateCreateRequest.title: CandidateCreateRequest

Invalidate current token and session via Redis denylist.

post.description:
Create candidate profile resource.

Args:
    request: HTTP request context.
    payload: Candidate create request.
    _: RBAC validated role marker.
    auth_context: Authenticated actor context.
    service: Candidate domain service.

Returns:
    CandidateResponse: Created profile payload.
